currentFAQs.q: How much does foundation repair cost in {{CITY}}?
currentFAQs.a: Most homeowners in {{CITY}} pay between {{AVG_LOW}} and {{AVG_HIGH}} for foundation repair, depending on the type and extent of damage.

currentFAQs.q: How many piers does a typical foundation repair need?
currentFAQs.a: Most homes need 8 to 12 piers for a typical foundation repair. Each pier costs {{RATE_PIER}} installed in {{CITY_STATE}}. The exact number depends on the extent of settlement and your home's footprint.

currentFAQs.q: Does foundation repair come with a warranty?
currentFAQs.a: Most reputable foundation repair companies offer a transferable lifetime warranty on pier installations. Always confirm warranty terms and transferability before signing a contract.

proposedFAQs.qTemplate: How much does foundation repair cost in {{CITY}}?
Why is foundation repair more | less expensive in {{CITY}}?
What foundation issues are most common in {{CITY}}?
proposedFAQs.note: Foundation issues are 100% city-soil-driven: TX clay = heave, FL sand = subsidence, North = frost heave. Distinct signal.

proposedFAQs.qTemplate: When is the best time for foundation repair in {{CITY}}?
What red flags should I watch for hiring a foundation contractor in {{CITY}}?
Does {{CITY}}, {{STATE}} require an engineer's report for foundation work?
proposedFAQs.note: Engineer-stamp requirement varies by state — TX/FL/CA require for major repairs, others don't. High-value FAQ.
